What We Do

Nonprofit Tax Services

Everything your 501(c)(3) needs to stay compliant, protect tax-exempt status, and keep donors confident — from formation through annual filings.

Form 990 / 990-EZ / 990-N Preparation

Full-service annual information return preparation for public charities and private foundations. Schedules A through R, governance disclosures, and board-ready review packets — filed on time, every year.

990-T (UBIT) Filings

Unrelated business income tax analysis, allocation of expenses, and Form 990-T preparation for nonprofits with taxable activities.

Tax-Exempt Application (1023/1024)

From reasonable compensation to narrative of activities — we prepare your exemption application end-to-end for IRS approval.

State Charitable Registration

Initial registrations and annual renewals in all 38 states that require them. Unified Registration Statement support included.

Audit Preparation

Financial statement audit readiness, workpaper support, and coordination with your independent auditor to reduce fieldwork time.

Board & Governance Advisory

Conflict of interest policies, executive compensation review, and board training on fiduciary duties and 990 disclosures.

Track Record

Numbers That Matter

A decade-plus of clean filings for organizations that can't afford surprises from the IRS or state attorneys general.

About

Nonprofit-Focused.
Mission-Aligned.

We work exclusively with tax-exempt organizations — public charities, private foundations, religious organizations, and educational nonprofits. No distractions, no learning curves, no surprises.

Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute review of your last 990 and compliance calendar. You leave with a clear picture of what's working and what needs attention before the next deadline.

How It Works

Your Path to Compliance

Three steps. Clear deadlines. No surprises at filing time.

1

Compliance Review

We review your last 990, bylaws, and state filings to identify gaps and build a custom compliance calendar.

2

Engagement & Planning

Fixed-fee engagement letter with clear deliverables, deadlines, and a secure portal for document exchange.

3

Filing & Board Review

We prepare, review with your board, and file everything on time — then keep watch for next year.

Client Reviews

What Clients Say

“
Our 990 used to be a last-minute scramble. Now it's board-reviewed two weeks before the deadline with every schedule clean. Our audit committee finally sleeps at night.
Executive Director
Community Foundation, $18M assets
“
They caught a UBIT exposure our prior CPA missed for three years. Helped us restructure the activity and file cleanly. Patient, thorough, and genuinely understand nonprofit governance.
Board Treasurer
Religious Organization
“
We expanded programs into 14 new states last year. Beacon handled every charitable registration without a single gap. Our development team could finally focus on fundraising instead of paperwork.
CFO
Education Nonprofit

Your Next 990
Doesn't Have to Be Stressful

Book a free 30-minute compliance review. We'll audit your last filing and flag anything you need to address before the next deadline.
